basic_details.job_title: DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Counsellor, DEO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Guntur (DCPU Guntur)
basic_details.post_name: Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Guntur (DCPU Guntur) Recruitment 2026: District Child Protection Unit Guntur has released the official notification for 3 Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, Data Entry Operator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling, PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication, Degree / Diploma Physical Educational Training, 12th pass with Diploma / Certificate in Computers
qualification.details: Counsellor: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling from a recognized university. (OR) PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication. PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher: Degree / Diploma Physical Educational Training. Data Entry Operator: 12th pass from a recognized Board / equivalent board with Diploma / Certificate in Computers.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: guntur.ap.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Guntur Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Guntur Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_child_protection_unit_guntur_dc: Counsellor, PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher, Data Entry Operator

Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling, PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication, Degree / Diploma Physical Educational Training, 12th pass with Diploma / Certificate in Computers

content_sections.heading: DCPU Guntur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Guntur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCPU Guntur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Counsellor: Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology / Public Health / Counselling from a recognized university. (OR) PG Diploma in Counselling and Communication. PT Instructor cum Yoga Teacher: Degree / Diploma Physical Educational Training. Data Entry Operator: 12th pass from a recognized Board / equivalent board with Diploma / Certificate in Computers.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government norms.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: guntur.ap.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DCPU Guntur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for various posts in the District Child Protection Unit Guntur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications range from Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Public Health/Counselling to 12th pass with a computer certificate, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Guntur Recruitment 2026 will be based on Merit and Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the announced vacancies?
faq.answer: The posts are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Guntur.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is RC.NO.61/A1/2026.
